resources.string: Enter the address of your Jellyseerr or Seerr server. This is the same URL you open in a web browser.
Tip: include the port (for example :5055). Plain http on your home network is fine.
That doesn\'t look like a valid address. Example: http://192.168.1.50:5055

Use the direction pad to move the highlight between buttons, links, posters and the sidebar.
Press center / OK to select.
Text boxes open the on-screen keyboard; press BACK to close it.
BACK goes back a page, then to the sidebar, then exits the app.
Hold BACK (or press MENU) for options such as Change server.
Make sure the server is on and the address is correct, then try again.
Press BACK again to exit Seerr
